name: Amadeus Self-Service APIs
purpose: Live flight search, fare offers, and seat availability.
notes: Recommended for real-time flight pricing and ticketing automation.

name: Hotelbeds API
purpose: Global hotel inventory, room rates, and booking content.
notes: Use to replace static hotel catalogs with bookable inventory.

name: Stripe
purpose: Online payments, webhooks, refunds, and subscription billing.
notes: Essential for secure checkout and payment settlement.

name: Twilio
purpose: OTP verification, SMS alerts, and WhatsApp notifications.
notes: Use for booking confirmations and itinerary updates.

name: SendGrid
purpose: Transactional emails, newsletters, and delivery analytics.
notes: Recommended for reliable email delivery and templates.

name: Google Maps Platform
purpose: Map embeds, distance calculation, and geocoding.
notes: Useful for hotel location maps and route intelligence.

name: ExchangeRate API
purpose: Live currency conversion for multi-country bookings.
notes: Enables dynamic pricing in PKR, USD, GBP, and AED.

name: OpenWeather
purpose: Destination weather data for package recommendation pages.
notes: Optional, but useful for travel planning insights.
